intro: Silly physics-based forklift game inspired by Japanese car culture!
description:
Silly physics-based forklift game inspired by Ghibli and Japanese car culture! Use your forklift skills in logic puzzles with many unexpected outcomes!

When all you have is a Forklift, everything looks like a palette.
Take a flight to Ghibli stylized JAPAN!
Let your forklift loose on a peaceful prefecture.

- Travel through the whole island and solve more than 30 puzzles to learn your story.
- Some truck takes your parking place? No problem, you can forklift them!
- Place Kei Cars in the right parking spots,
- They can have alarms,
- And might be Wired,
- Be smart about parking gates,
- Use illegal moves when no one sees,
- But sometimes you can help others.

Maybe they will show you how to cook Ramen? Of course, using a forklift!

Featuring:
- An elegant forklift straight from Japan (that's you)
- A lot of kei cars to stick on the fork,
- A dedicated beep button (!!!)
